description: Load the human PD-1/PD-L1 complex (PDB: 4ZQK). Identify the chains corresponding to PD-1 and PD-L1. Define the interface residues on PD-L1 (residues with at least one heavy atom within 4.5 Å of PD-1). Create a visualization with PD-1 and PD-L1 colored distinctly, showing the PD-L1 interface residues as sticks or surface, and the rest of the protein as cartoon. Save a high-resolution PNG figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/pd1_pdl1_interface.png. Write a quantitative structural report to ~/PyMOL_Data/pd1_pdl1_interface_report.txt containing: 1) The chain assignments (which is PD-1, which is PD-L1), 2) The exact count of interface residues on PD-L1 using the 4.5 Å cutoff, and 3) Confirmation of whether the four canonical PD-L1 hotspot residues (Tyr56, Arg113, Met115, Tyr123) are included in your interface selection.
